globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://static.cloudflareinsights.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.youtube.com https://*.youtu.be https://cloudflareinsights.com; frame-src 'self' https://www.faliqdoescoding.com https://faliqdoescoding.com https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https://*.youtube.com;
